scope.summary: Makes operator idempotency leases panic-safe by generation-tagging in-progress entries and dropping only the lease's own unresolved generation.
out_of_scope: No changes to dispatcher durable write-intent storage or Oracle execution semantics.
No formatting of unrelated pre-existing rustfmt drift in tests_operator.rs.

entry_points.name: operator idempotency regression set
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core idempotency -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 5/5 matched tests passed. This includes immediate Fresh retry after catch_unwind drops a Fresh lease, stale-generation drop preserving a newer in-progress entry, capacity eviction preserving in-progress entries, in-progress reporting before completion, and normal response replay/conflict behavior.

entry_points.name: panic-safe lease focused subset
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core operator_idempotency -- --nocapture` exited 0 with 3/3 matched tests passed, covering the new panic-drop and stale-generation lease behavior plus the existing in-progress-before-complete contract.

entry_points.name: scoped clippy
entry_points.trace: `env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo clippy -p oraclemcp-core --lib -- -D warnings` exited 0.

entry_points.name: shared-checkout staged discipline
entry_points.trace: `scripts/swarm_discipline.sh struct-atomicity --staged && scripts/swarm_discipline.sh stale-delete-check --staged` exited 0 before the source commit.

limitations: The proof is local and scoped to the operator idempotency ledger/HTTP edge. It does not claim a full workspace gate.
`rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/oraclemcp-core/src/http/tests_operator.rs` was not used as evidence because that existing file has unrelated formatting drift outside this bead's hunks.
